design_philosophy: A modern, creative, immersive, mobile-first experience blending the exclusive feel of a luxury VIP lounge with the high energy of a neon-lit nightclub. Tension is created through deep void blacks contrasting with vibrant hot pink and metallic gold.

rules: H1 must be massive (text-5xl to text-7xl fluid) with tracking-tighter and leading-none.
Headlines must never be centered by default; use asymmetric alignment.
Overlines/Subtitles must be uppercase, tracking-[0.2em], text-xs or text-sm, colored in secondary (Gold).
NEVER use Inter, Roboto, or generic sans-serif for headings.

spacing_and_layout.padding_scale: Generous: Use p-6, p-12, p-20. Vertical section padding should be py-24 or py-32.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento 'Tetris' Grid for gallery: asymmetric combinations of col-span-4 to col-span-8 to break monotony.
spacing_and_layout.hero_section: Fullscreen (min-h-screen). Background image MUST have an overlay of bg-black/50 to bg-black/70 to ensure text contrast. Never exceed 70% opacity.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Mobile-first. Use optical alignment over strict geometric centering.

components.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: sticky top-0 z-50, backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60, border-b border-white/10.
components.cards: Avoid default Shadcn Cards. Use flat, sharp-edged rectangular divs with 1px border-white/10. On hover: border-pink-500/50, scale-[1.02] transform, and drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,42,133,0.3)].
components.buttons: Primary (Réserver): bg-[#FF2A85] text-white font-bold tracking-wide hover:bg-[#E61E70] transition-all. Secondary: Transparent with border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-black.
components.forms: Shadcn highly customized. Dark backgrounds (bg-surface), subtle white/10 borders, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF2A85].
components.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for an 'Editorial Ribbon' separating sections (e.g., 'UPCOMING EVENTS • VIP TABLES • EXCLUSIVE BOOKING'). High contrast or outline text.

motion.scroll: Smooth scrolling is MANDATORY. Use framer-motion for scroll-triggered reveal animations.
motion.interactions: Micro-interactions on hover. For images inside cards, use overflow-hidden on parent and scale-110 on image hover with a slow transition (duration-700).
motion.page_transitions: Splash screen with logo fading out, followed by staggered fade-up of hero elements.

splash_bg.description: Dynamic neon light trails for splash screen background

hero_bg.description: Abstract pink neon dark background for hero section

event_1.description: Energetic nightclub scene with DJ and crowd in vibrant pink lighting

event_2.description: Crowd of people at a concert/nightclub

event_3.description: Silhouettes of concert crowd enjoying vibrant lighting

vip_lounge.description: Chic modern lounge with dramatic red/pink lighting for VIP Booking section

dj_performing.description: DJ mixing tracks in a dimly lit club, for gallery or about section

accessibility: Include data-testid on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='booking-submit-button').
Ensure contrast ratio >= 4.5:1 for body text.
Focus rings must be clearly visible on all inputs and interactive elements.
instructions_to_main_agent: Install `framer-motion` for animations and page transitions.
Implement a dedicated Splash Screen component that shows the 'GHF_AGENCY' typography/logo, fading out before rendering the main layout.
Build the Gallery using a masonry grid layout (CSS columns or a masonry package).
Implement Google Login UI in the Auth modal/page alongside standard JWT forms.
Mock the Google Drive integration for the gallery upload feature.
Ensure all text is overlaid on media with appropriate gradient or solid opacity backgrounds to maintain readability.
DO NOT use generic placeholder URLs for images. Use the exact media URLs provided in this JSON.
